name: Sean "Diddy" Combs

acts.description: Federal indictment on sex trafficking, racketeering, and transportation for prostitution charges; multiple civil suits from victims
Hotel surveillance footage showing physical assault of then-girlfriend Cassie Ventura

behavior_summary: Arrested in 2024 on federal sex trafficking and racketeering charges. Hotel footage of him assaulting Cassie Ventura was published. Multiple civil suits allege coerced sex acts and abuse going back years.

art.summary: Built one of hip-hop's most influential labels and defined 90s hip-hop luxury. Discovered and developed multiple generational artists.

verdict.blurb: Federal sex trafficking charges, hotel assault footage, dozens of civil suits, and a rap sheet that suggests his entire social infrastructure was built around coercion. He is currently awaiting trial.
